text:
:handshake: Remote Job Hunting Partnership
Hey everyone,
I'm a full stack developer with 10+ years of experience, and I'm looking for a long-term partner to collaborate with for remote job opportunities in the US and Europe market.
Important clarification:
This is NOT an outsourcing post and there is no active client project right now. I am looking for someone to partner with during the remote job hunting process itself. The goal is to apply for remote positions together and handle the communication/interview side professionally once opportunities come in.
I’m strong on the technical side and will handle the technical work, resume preparation, applications, company research, interview preparation, and overall process. What I need is someone with strong English communication skills who can confidently handle calls, HR screenings, client conversations, and interview discussions. I’ll always support you throughout the process — you won’t be doing things alone.
What I’m looking for:
• Good spoken English and confident communication
• Basic software development understanding
• Available during US/EU business hours
• Honest, reliable, and serious about long-term collaboration
What you get:
• Partnership-based collaboration
• Revenue sharing/payment arrangement once we successfully land a remote role or project together
• Full technical support and preparation from my side
Open to candidates from many countries as long as you have stable internet and can join calls professionally.
If this sounds interesting, feel free to DM me and introduce yourself.
